description: Structural container that wraps input components (TextField, Textarea, etc.). Manages Label, Description, Helper/Error message, and Character Count. Propagates state (error, disabled, readOnly, required) to child inputs via React Context. No CVA, no state overlay, no interactive states on itself.

id.description: Unique ID. Used for Label-Input connection (htmlFor/id) and aria-describedby generation.

layout.description: Label position. top = vertical stack, left = grid with label and content side by side.

required.description: Required state. Shows red asterisk after label. Propagated to child input via Context.

description.description: Description text displayed between label and input.

helperText.description: Helper text below input. Replaced by errorMessage when error=true.

error.description: Validation error state. Propagated to child input via Context.

errorMessage.description: Error message. Replaces helperText when error=true.

disabled.description: Disabled state. Propagated to child input via Context.

readOnly.description: Read-only state. Propagated to child input via Context.

count.description: Current character count. Used with maxCount for character counter display.

maxCount.description: Maximum character count. Used with count for character counter display.

children.description: Child input component (TextField, Textarea, etc.). Receives state via FormFieldContext.

top.structure: Vertical flex column. Label on top, then description (optional), then input, then bottom row.

left.structure: CSS Grid (auto 1fr). Label left-aligned with pt-[3px] offset. Content in right column.

states.note: FormField itself has no interactive states. It visually reflects child states through color token changes on text elements.

error.note: Error message replaces helperText. Bottom text uses aria-live='polite'.

propagatedValues.id: string — used by child input for id attribute
propagatedValues.error: boolean — child input applies error styling
propagatedValues.disabled: boolean — child input applies disabled state
propagatedValues.readOnly: boolean — child input applies readOnly state

accessibility.landmark: role='group' with aria-labelledby pointing to label element
accessibility.describedBy: id-based: {id}-description, {id}-bottom for aria-describedby (consumed by child input)
accessibility.errorAnnouncement: Bottom text uses aria-live='polite' for dynamic error/helper text changes
accessibility.requiredIndicator: Red asterisk (*) with aria-hidden — visual only, actual required state conveyed via aria-required on input

implementation.pattern: React Context + cn (no CVA — single layout, no multi-variant styling)
implementation.spacingStrategy: Inline style marginTop with CSS custom properties for inter-element gaps. Conditional gap selection based on presence of description.
